title: Add unittests and fix bugs
body:
* Improved error messages
* Improved checking of user input

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: This is the promised clean up, bug fixes and more unit tests

@jwhonce Would you mind changing the commit messages to prefix them with "Python:" or similar? We're generating changelogs out of our commit logs, so it would be nice if we could distinguish where commits are going.
Changes LGTM, going to kick the bot as the tests other than travis failed without leaving any details.

LGTM
But need to get tests working.
My PR just failed these same three tests with the same "internal error".  Is there someone we can talk to about them?  Looks like some kind of test environment issue going around.
@jlebon Is papr down? We're seeing consistent "Internal Error" failures, which I'm assuming means provisioning VMs?
Yes, it's down. IT is investigating OpenStack failures.
@mheon Will do.  How about using the package name as a label  "[python-podman]"  ?  /cc @baude

Tests green, going to merge
@rh-atomic-bot r+
